compiled_state.title: Create review-stats.sh bash wrapper
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/scripts/review-stats.sh — thin bash wrapper that:
1. Resolves .review-events/ directory on the tickets orphan branch
2. Parses CLI args (--since, --all) and passes to review-stats.py
3. Calls python3 $SCRIPT_DIR/review-stats.py --events-dir=<path> [--since=<date>] [--all]
4. Outputs the formatted summary table to stdout

Follows the established bash-wrapper-calls-Python pattern (ticket-show.sh, ticket-lifecycle.sh).

## TDD Requirement
GREEN — Task 3 RED tests pass.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/review-stats.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass. Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable. Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/review-stats.sh
- [ ] All 4 wrapper tests pass. Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-review-stats.sh

comments.body: AC amendment: Wrapper uses timeout guard around Python subprocess
comments.author: Main
